title: Henbrandt Single Bouncing Putty 2-Tone Tub 60g Squishy Fun Sensory Relief Fidget Bouncy Putty Kids Party Bag Favours Loot Bag Stocking Fillers Lucky Dip Favours for Boys and Girls
features: Single pack of 4-Tone Bouncing Putty for kids.

These colourful tubs of 2-tone putty in Blue, Green, Pink and Purple are fantastic party favours, loot bag fillers, school rewards, classroom gifts, Christmas stocking fillers, small gifts, lucky dip prizes, and more!
The bouncing putty tubs are designed to create a satisfying tactile experience, and the small putty tubs are ideal for people with anxiety or sensory fidget toys for those with autism and ADHD.
Size: 7.0cm x 7.0cm x 4.5cm / 2.7inch x 2.7inch x 1.7inch. Weight: 30g.
Not suitable for children aged 3 and under.
description: Product description These fantastic tubs of bouncing putty each contain 2 vibrant colours of putty, neatly divided into 2 colourful subsections! The putty tub makes an excellent party favour for kids, Christmas stocking fillers, loot bag fillers, classroom prizes, pocket money toys, and more. The tubs are the perfect size for small hands and the putty is soft and pliable and super bouncy, while the bright colours offer a huge range of imaginative potential and make it an instant childhood favourite. Fidget putty can also be helpful for people with ADHD and Autism, or as an exercise for sufferers of arthritis, as well as making a great stress toy that helps with anxiety and stress relief by providing something to fidget with to help with focus. Each tub is divided into 2 equal colour segments of Blue, Green, Pink or Purple, and there is approx. 15g of each colour. The bouncy putty tubs measure approx. 7.0cm x 7.0cm x 4.5cm and contain 30g of putty overall. Single 2-tone bouncing putty tub per order. The bouncing putty is not suitable for children under 3 and adult supervision is recommended. This product is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, small parts. Staining risk, adult supervision is recommended.
